When reading a document, a word cloud of glossary terms will appear here. A word cloud is a cluster of words where bigger and bolder sizes are used to show how many times it appeared in the text.
For documents which have related articles, the icon will show up next to listing, indicating that the article is part of a series or has follow up commentary in the journal.
